calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-11-2024 Vacated

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Aug-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jenn French, Esq., Wililams Iagmin LLP, 619-238-0370, jenn@williamsiagmin.com, for Plaintiff James S. Lagmin, (In-Person)
Shamika K. Bains, Esq., CHOLAKIAN & ASSOCIATES (650) 871-9544 sbains@cholakian.net for Defendants Mendocino Grove, LLC and Christopher J. Hougie (via ZOOM)
Shelly Kramer, Esq., TYSON & MENDES, LLP., 628-253-5070 For Defendants, Richard Takeuchi aand Alexandra Fay Barney, (via ZOOM)

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MENDOCINO GROVE, LLC, CHRISTOPHER HOUGIE MOTION TO TRANSFER.

The "motion to transfer action to Mendocino County Superior Court" is granted.

This action involves an August 2020 traffic accident in Mendocino County. It was filed in San Francisco Superior Court in July 2022, apparently on plaintiffs' mistaken belief that two defendants then resided here. In fact, the two defendants' December 2022 interrogatory responses show they had moved to Texas in January 2022, before "the commencement of the action." (Bains Dec. Ex. D 3:36-4:7, Ex. E 3:25-4:6; CCP 395(a).) Thus, ours is not a "proper court for the trial of the action." (Id.; see also CCP 397.)

Plaintiffs apparently concede the relevant facts, but argue that movants "waived their right to change venue." However, the December 2022 discovery responses should have alerted plaintiffs to their error and movants raised it in April 2023 in any event. A case both sides cite found no waiver of rights to change venue in a similar time lapse. (Walt Disney Parks & Resorts U.S., Inc. v. Sup. Ct. (2018) 21 Cal.App.5th 872.) Nor does any activity that occurred in this court impede a trial in Mendocino County. Plaintiffs shall pay the transfer costs.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2022 Set For Trial On Apr-29-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
